findings.body: buildGateTrustSignal currently sets freshness_state from fileExists only, so stale is never emitted; pass computed stale/current/missing state from the same logic that drives readStaleEvidence/source_drift_status/review_subject_hash_status into evidence_trust_signals.

The artifact-type prerequisite error message mentions freshness budget, source identity, freshness state, and staleness behavior even though this branch only checks source_artifacts and owner or authority_role.

The evidence-freshness SLO template lists work_item, policy, artifact_types, trust_signal_requirements, derived_projection_rules, and source_artifacts as flat sibling keys instead of using indentation for the intended hierarchy.
requireNonEmptyString validates the trimmed length but returns the original string, preserving leading or trailing whitespace in validated ids.
The repeated evidence_slo assignment in gate trust signals can be replaced with a small wrapper helper around buildGateTrustSignal.

attempts.summary: CodeRabbit completed the focused BANDIT-056 Stage 3 delta review and returned two trivial open findings against focused session-context pathExists sequencing and review_subject_hash source_identity metadata.
Codex PM locally repaired both prior CodeRabbit findings. Provider evidence was intentionally stale until focused CodeRabbit refresh on the repaired source.

Focused CodeRabbit refresh completed on the repaired source and returned five open findings: one major stale-freshness trust-signal issue, three minor validation/template normalization issues, and one trivial cockpit-status helper extraction issue.

executableEvidence: coderabbit auth status --agent returned authenticated for GitHub user pyxe-developer.
coderabbit review --agent --base-commit c5eb2700502237e3269a82818edd994a4006d878 -c AGENTS.md --no-color completed with 5 findings.
